---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new flex property, render feature, or API addition
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Pilates doesn't currently support? What
workaround are you using today, if any?

## Proposed solution

What would the API or behavior look like? A concrete sketch helps:

```ts
// e.g. a new prop, a new method, a new render option
node.setAspectRatio(2);
```

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you've thought about solving this. Why this approach over those?

## Additional context

Links to spec docs (CSS Flexbox spec, related projects), prior art, or
constraints worth knowing.
